## Summary
Indo Premier Sekuritas analyzes the outlook for Indonesia's nickel sector, examining supply-demand dynamics and policy impacts on metal producers.

## Key Points
• Indonesia nickel sector outlook under review
• Supply-demand balance shifting with policy changes
• ANTM and INCO face evolving market conditions
• ESSA's ammonia business linked to nickel processing trends
• Sector consolidation and efficiency drives ongoing

## Portfolio Impact
🟡 **Neutral/Watch** — Your watchlist includes ANTM and INCO (nickel miners). This sector analysis from Indo Premier suggests continued volatility in nickel markets. ESSA's +8.44% Tuesday rally shows chemical sector resilience despite nickel uncertainty. Monitor for entry opportunities in ANTM/INCO if nickel prices stabilize.
